caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's dashboard, focusing on the instrument cluster and ignition area. The camera is positioned to capture the speedometer, tachometer, fuel gauge, and other indicators, all of which are illuminated. A set of keys is inserted into the ignition, with the key fob and additional keys hanging down. The "Door Ajar" warning light is illuminated, indicating that one of the car doors is not fully closed. The dashboard also features buttons for various functions such as "INST/AVR," "RANGE," and "FUEL." The scene suggests that the car is stationary, possibly with the engine off or just starting up, as the driver prepares to operate the vehicle. The overall setting appears to be inside a garage or a similar enclosed space, given the lighting and background.
